ticks.note: No tick log files found in lookback window (1440 min). Heartbeat tick=4 confirms main loop executes, but no tick log files were located by the snapshot script. Non-alarming on its own but should be confirmed with operator.

Either the monitoring layer is not running, its log path differs from the snapshot collection path, or it was never started in the current process group. Warrants investigation.

anomalies: CRITICAL INFRA: Anthropic API credit balance is zero. Layer-1 automated analysis (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) offline for all runs. Must be replenished for automated snapshot grading to resume. OPERATOR ATTENTION REQUIRED.

Plumbing handled this correctly (rc=1, valid rejection, full path exercised per smoke contract). However, if bybit_2 is intended as a live trading account its exchange client is not initialised — API credentials may not be loaded into the environment. Operator must confirm whether bybit_2 is active or intentionally unconfigured.

No tick or signal log files in 1440 min despite src.main running (heartbeat tick=4 in ~4h uptime is low). Could reflect market session gating or strategy inactivity window, but should be explicitly confirmed by operator.
No monitor/watchdog logs found at all. Monitoring layer may not be logging to the path the snapshot script searches, or may not have been started in the current session.
